# Jiptori (집토리, apt-recom)

> A service that recommends, compares, and analyzes apartment complexes (아파트 단지) across South Korea, matched to user lifestyle keywords — e.g. quiet neighborhood (조용한 동네), near elementary school (초등학교 근거리), large complex (대단지), new build (신축).

## Data Sources

- 국토교통부 (Ministry of Land, Infrastructure and Transport) real-transaction system — sale & jeonse/monthly-rent (매매·전월세) history
- K-APT (공동주택 관리정보 시스템, apartment management information system) — maintenance fees, facilities, structure
- 공공데이터포털 (data.go.kr) — CCTV / public-safety open data
- 교육청 (regional education offices) — school-district (학군) assignment

## Key Features

- **NUDGE scoring**: ranks apartment complexes on a 0–100 score weighted by the user's selected lifestyle categories
- **Price score / Safety score**: objective per-complex scores (jeonse ratio 전세비율, price per ㎡, nearby CCTV density, etc.)
- **Sale & rent history (매매·전월세 이력)**: recent transactions and long-term trends, visualized
- **Facility / school-district analysis**: distance and count of school zones (초·중·고 학군), subway stations, parks, hospitals, and other amenities
- **Apartment comparison**: side-by-side metric matrix for 2–5 complexes
- **AI chatbot**: handles recommend / compare / analyze requests in natural language (Korean)

## API

Public REST API is served under `/api/*`. See the OpenAPI document for the full spec.

- `GET /api/apartments` — apartment list by map viewport / sigungu (시군구)
- `GET /api/apartments/search?q={keyword}` — keyword search by region or complex name
- `GET /api/apartment/{pnu}` — apartment detail (basic info, scores, transaction history, school district)
- `POST /api/nudge/score` — lifestyle-based recommendation scoring
- `GET /api/similar/{pnu}` — similar-apartment recommendations
- `GET /api/dashboard/summary` — price trend by sigungu (시군구)
- `GET /api/dashboard/trend` — monthly price & transaction-volume trend
- `POST /api/chat/stream` — chatbot SSE streaming response
- `GET /openapi.json` — full OpenAPI 3.0 spec

## Optional

- Website: https://apt-recom.kr
- Sitemap: https://apt-recom.kr/sitemap.xml
